items.situation: career fair preparation workshop with resume review
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. With the Fall Career Fair just two weeks away, the Career Services Office is hosting a preparation workshop this Thursday at 4 p.m. in Hartley Hall, Room 210. We'll cover how to research employers, polish your elevator pitch, and dress professionally for interviews. If you'd like a one-on-one resume review during the session, you must email a copy of your resume to our office by Wednesday at noon so an advisor can read it in advance. Walk-ins are welcome for the general workshop, but the individual reviews are limited to those who submit early. Don't miss this chance to stand out before the big day.

questions.stem: What must students do to receive a one-on-one resume review?

options.A: Email their resume by Wednesday at noon
options.B: Sign up on the Career Services website
options.C: Arrive early to the Thursday workshop
options.D: Bring a printed resume to Hartley Hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告明确说想获得一对一简历点评的学生必须在周三中午前把简历发邮件给办公室，让顾问提前阅读。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告从未提到在网站上报名，报名渠道是邮箱。C错误（misattributed_detail）：早到只对一般工作坊的walk-in有意义，但简历点评要求的是提前提交，不是早到。D错误（wrong_detail）：公告要求发送电子版简历，并未要求带纸质简历到现场。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the individual resume reviews?

options.A: They are open to all who attend the workshop
options.B: They will be conducted after the career fair
options.C: Advisors prepare before meeting each student
options.D: They cost an additional registration fee

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告说要提前发简历好让顾问能事先阅读，由此可推断顾问会在见学生之前做准备。A错误（reversed_intent）：公告明说个人点评仅限提前提交的人，并非对所有参加者开放。B错误（wrong_detail）：点评是在周四工作坊期间进行，而非工作展结束后。D错误（over_inference）：公告完全没有提到任何费用，属于过度推断。

items.situation: campus dining hall switching to summer hours
items.announcement: Attention students and staff. Now that final exams have ended, the Riverside Dining Hall will be moving to its summer schedule beginning next Monday. From then on, we'll serve breakfast from 8 to 10 a.m. and dinner from 5 to 7 p.m., but lunch service will be suspended entirely until the fall term resumes. Please be aware that the smaller café in the library annex will stay open midday for anyone needing a meal between classes or summer research. Meal plan balances from the spring semester will not carry over, so be sure to use any remaining funds before Friday. We appreciate your patience as we adjust to the quieter summer pace.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To apologize for closing the dining hall permanently
options.B: To inform students of the dining hall's summer hours
options.C: To promote the café in the library annex
options.D: To explain how meal plans are purchased

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告核心是通知Riverside餐厅从下周一起改用暑期作息，包括取消午餐、调整早晚餐时间。A错误（reversed_intent）：餐厅只是改为暑期时间，并非永久关闭，方向相反。C错误（too_narrow）：图书馆附楼咖啡馆只是顺带提到的替代选择，不是公告主旨。D错误（wrong_purpose）：公告讲的是春季餐费余额到期，而非如何购买餐费计划。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker mention the café in the library annex?

options.A: Because it is replacing the dining hall in fall
options.B: Because it offers cheaper meals than the dining hall
options.C: Because it extends its hours for the summer
options.D: Because the dining hall no longer serves lunch

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告说暑期午餐服务完全停止，紧接着提到咖啡馆中午仍开放，可推断提它是为午间没饭吃的人提供替代选择。A错误（over_inference）：公告从未说秋季咖啡馆会取代餐厅，餐厅秋季会恢复。B错误（unrelated_inference）：公告没有比较两者价格，价格更便宜毫无依据。C错误（wrong_detail）：公告说的是咖啡馆中午保持开放，并未说它延长了营业时间。

items.situation: annual outdoor movie night with blanket seating
items.announcement: Hello, everyone. The Student Activities Board is thrilled to invite you to our annual Outdoor Movie Night this Saturday on the Quad lawn. The film begins at sunset, around 8:30 p.m., but we encourage you to arrive by 8 to find a good spot. Since seating is on the grass, please bring your own blanket or a low folding chair to sit on. We'll have free popcorn and lemonade available near the projector while supplies last. In case of rain, the event will move indoors to the Student Union ballroom, so check our social media that afternoon for any updates. We can't wait to see you there.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain how to join the Student Activities Board
options.B: To announce a change to the Quad's lawn hours
options.C: To invite students to an outdoor movie night
options.D: To remind students about a rainy weather policy

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告主旨是邀请大家参加本周六在草坪上举办的年度户外电影之夜。A错误（wrong_purpose）：公告没有讲如何加入学生活动委员会。B错误（too_narrow）：公告未涉及草坪的开放时间变更。D错误（too_narrow）：雨天改室内只是末尾的一个细节提醒，不是整条公告的目的。

questions.stem: What are students asked to bring to the event?

options.A: A blanket or a low folding chair
options.B: Their own popcorn and lemonade
options.C: A valid student ID card
options.D: An umbrella in case of rain

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告说因为是在草地上就座，请大家自带毯子或低折叠椅。B错误（wrong_detail）：爆米花和柠檬水是现场免费提供的，不需要自带。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告没有提到需要出示学生证。D错误（misattributed_detail）：公告提到下雨会改到室内，但并未要求学生带伞。

items.announcement: Good morning, students. This is a reminder that the Student Health Office will hold an information session on enrolling in the university health insurance plan this Wednesday at 3 p.m. in the Wellness Center lobby. An advisor will walk you through the coverage options, explain how to waive the plan if you already have insurance, and answer your questions. To complete the waiver, you'll need to bring proof of your existing coverage, such as an insurance card or a letter from your provider. The enrollment deadline is September 30th, and students who miss it will be automatically enrolled in the standard plan. Feel free to drop by; no appointment is necessary.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a change to the health insurance plan
options.B: To remind students to visit the Wellness Center
options.C: To explain why the standard plan is the best choice
options.D: To inform students about a health insurance session

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告主旨是告知学生本周三将举办关于大学医保计划报名的信息说明会。A错误（wrong_purpose）：公告没有说医保计划本身有任何变动。B错误（too_narrow）：去健康中心只是地点，不是公告目的。C错误（wrong_purpose）：公告只是中立介绍各选项，并未论证标准计划最好。

questions.stem: What do students need to bring in order to waive the plan?

options.A: A completed enrollment form
options.B: Proof of their existing coverage
options.C: A payment for the standard plan
options.D: A signed letter from an advisor

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告明确说要办理豁免，需要带上现有保险的证明，如保险卡或保险公司的证明信。A错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告没有提到要带填好的报名表。C错误（misattributed_detail）：标准计划是错过截止日期后被自动加入的，不涉及现场付款。D错误（wrong_detail）：需要的是保险公司出具的信，而不是顾问签字的信。

items.announcement: Attention senior students. The Engineering Department has finalized the schedule for this year's capstone presentations, which will take place over three days, from Tuesday through Thursday next week, in the Patterson Building. Each team has been assigned a forty-minute slot, and the full schedule is now posted outside the department office and on the course portal. Please note that while attendance at your own session is mandatory, you are also expected to attend at least two other teams' presentations as part of your participation grade. Faculty evaluators will arrive promptly, so teams should set up their equipment fifteen minutes before their assigned time. A brief reception with light refreshments will follow on Thursday afternoon.

questions.stem: What are seniors required to do besides presenting their own project?

options.A: Attend at least two other teams' presentations
options.B: Submit a written report to faculty evaluators
options.C: Sign up for a forty-minute presentation slot
options.D: Help organize the Thursday reception

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告说除了自己的展示必须出席外，作为参与成绩的一部分，还要至少观看另外两个团队的展示。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告提到有教师评委，但从未要求提交书面报告。C错误（wrong_detail）：四十分钟的时段是已经分配好的，学生不需要自己报名选时段。D错误（misattributed_detail）：周四确有招待会，但公告没有要求学生帮忙筹办。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker mention that faculty evaluators will arrive promptly?

options.A: To explain why the schedule was posted late
options.B: To warn that presentations may run overtime
options.C: To stress that teams should set up in advance
options.D: To suggest that evaluators are very strict graders

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。提到评委会准时到场，紧接着要求团队提前十五分钟布置设备，可推断这是在强调团队需提前准备好以免耽误。A错误（unrelated_inference）：公告没有说日程发布得晚，也未把准时与发布时间联系起来。B错误（over_inference）：公告并未暗示展示会超时，反而是要求按时开始。D错误（over_inference）：从准时到场推不出评委打分严格，属过度推断。

items.situation: recreation center temporarily closing the weight room for new equipment installation
items.announcement: Attention all rec center members. The main weight room on the second floor will be closed from this Monday through Wednesday while we install a new set of strength-training machines. During the closure, free weights and cardio equipment on the first floor will remain fully available, and the upstairs studios will continue hosting their regular fitness classes. We've also arranged extended hours at the smaller annex gym in Lawson Hall, which will open at 6 a.m. on those three days. Members who had personal training sessions booked for the weight room have already been contacted to reschedule. The renovated space should reopen Thursday morning with all-new equipment.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A temporary closure of the weight room for new equipment
options.B: A permanent relocation of the recreation center
options.C: A new schedule for upstairs fitness classes
options.D: A cancellation of all personal training sessions

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告主旨是二楼力量训练区周一至周三临时关闭以安装新器械。B错误（reversed_intent）：器械区只是临时关闭三天，并非整个活动中心永久搬迁。C错误（too_narrow）：楼上健身课照常进行只是附带信息，不是主旨。D错误（wrong_detail）：原本约在器械区的私教课是被重新安排，而非全部取消。

questions.stem: What is true about the annex gym in Lawson Hall during the closure?

options.A: It will open earlier than usual
options.B: It will host all the displaced fitness classes
options.C: It will be reserved for personal training only
options.D: It will close along with the weight room

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告说Lawson Hall附属健身房在这三天延长开放时间，早上6点就开门，比平时更早。B错误（misattributed_detail）：健身课照常在楼上工作室进行，并未转移到附属健身房。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告没有说附属健身房只供私教使用。D错误（reversed_intent）：附属健身房不是跟着关闭，而是延长开放作为替代场所。

items.situation: registrar moving the final exam period one day earlier due to a campus holiday
items.announcement: This is an important notice from the Registrar's Office regarding the upcoming final exam period. Because of the newly added campus holiday on Friday, December 8th, the entire exam schedule has been shifted one day earlier than originally published. Exams will now run from Monday, December 4th, through Thursday, December 7th. We strongly encourage you to log in to the student portal and reconfirm the new date, time, and room for each of your exams, as some locations have changed as well. If you discover a conflict between two exams under the revised schedule, contact your instructor before this Friday to arrange an alternate sitting. The updated calendar is already available online.

questions.stem: Why has the final exam schedule been changed?

options.A: Because a new campus holiday was added
options.B: Because too many exam rooms were unavailable
options.C: Because students requested an earlier start
options.D: Because of a conflict with graduation ceremonies

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告说由于12月8日周五新增了校园假日，整个考试日程提前了一天。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告提到部分考场有变，但变更原因是假日，而非考场不够用。C错误（wrong_detail）：是学校因假日调整，并非学生要求提前。D错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告完全没有提到毕业典礼。

questions.stem: What are students advised to do because of the change?

options.A: Reconfirm each exam's date, time, and room online
options.B: Pick up a printed schedule from the Registrar
options.C: Reschedule all of their exams with instructors
options.D: Wait for an email before checking the portal

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告建议学生登录学生门户，重新确认每场考试的新日期、时间和教室，因为有些考场也变了。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告说更新日历已在线提供，并未让学生去注册办公室领纸质表。C错误（wrong_detail）：只有发现两场考试冲突时才需联系老师，而非把所有考试都重新安排。D错误（reversed_intent）：公告让学生主动登录门户核对，而不是等邮件。

items.situation: library introducing a new quiet-study policy on the upper floors
items.announcement: Good afternoon. The University Library is introducing a new quiet-study policy that takes effect this coming Monday. Beginning then, the third and fourth floors will be designated as silent zones, where all phone calls, group discussions, and laptop audio are prohibited. Students who wish to study together or hold group meetings should instead use the bookable study rooms on the first floor, which can be reserved through the library's website. To help everyone adjust, staff will be stationed on the upper floors during the first week to answer questions and offer gentle reminders. We believe these changes will create a more focused environment, especially as midterm season approaches.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a new quiet-study policy in the library
options.B: To remind students to reserve study rooms early
options.C: To explain why the library is extending its hours
options.D: To recruit student staff for the upper floors

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告主旨是图书馆将从下周一起实施新的安静自习政策，把三、四楼设为静音区。B错误（too_narrow）：预订一楼研讨室只是替代方案中的一个细节，不是公告目的。C错误（wrong_purpose）：公告完全没有提到延长开放时间。D错误（wrong_purpose）：工作人员会驻守楼层是为答疑提醒，公告并非在招募学生员工。

questions.stem: Where should students go if they want to study in a group?

options.A: The bookable study rooms on the first floor
options.B: The silent zones on the third and fourth floors
options.C: Any open table during the first week only
options.D: The library website's virtual meeting space

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告说想一起学习或开小组会的学生应改用一楼可预订的研讨室。B错误（reversed_intent）：三、四楼恰恰是禁止小组讨论的静音区，方向相反。C错误（misattributed_detail）：第一周只是工作人员驻守答疑的时段，与小组学习地点无关。D错误（wrong_detail）：网站是用来预订实体研讨室的，并非提供线上虚拟会议空间。

items.situation: international food festival hosted by cultural student organizations
items.announcement: Hi, everyone. The Coalition of Cultural Clubs is excited to host our first International Food Festival this Friday afternoon on the Memorial Plaza. From noon until 4 p.m., more than a dozen student groups will set up booths serving dishes from their home countries, all completely free for you to sample. There will also be live music and traditional dance performances throughout the afternoon on the main stage. If you'd like to volunteer at a booth or perform, just fill out the short form linked on our club's Instagram page by Wednesday. Please remember to bring your own reusable water bottle, since we're trying to keep the event waste-free. Come hungry and curious!

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To invite students to an international food festival
options.B: To recruit new members for the cultural clubs
options.C: To announce a fundraiser for international students
options.D: To advertise a cooking class series on campus

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告主旨是邀请大家参加本周五在纪念广场举办的首届国际美食节。B错误（wrong_purpose）：公告招募的是当天活动的志愿者和表演者，而非俱乐部新成员。C错误（wrong_purpose）：食物完全免费品尝，活动并非筹款。D错误（wrong_purpose）：这是一次美食节活动，不是烹饪课程系列。

questions.stem: What are attendees asked to bring to the festival?

options.A: A reusable water bottle
options.B: A dish from their home country
options.C: Cash to purchase food samples
options.D: A completed volunteer form

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告请大家自带可重复使用的水瓶，因为活动力求做到零废弃。B错误（misattributed_detail）：摆摊提供家乡菜的是各学生社团，普通参加者不需要带菜。C错误（wrong_detail）：所有食物都是免费品尝的，不需要带现金。D错误（misattributed_detail）：只有想做志愿者或表演的人才需提前填表，普通参加者无需如此。

items.situation: graduate school reminding students of the thesis submission deadline for spring graduation
items.announcement: Attention graduate students planning to graduate this spring. The Graduate School wishes to remind you that the final deadline to submit your completed thesis for format review is Friday, April 5th, at 5 p.m. Submissions must be uploaded as a single PDF through the online thesis portal; emailed copies will not be accepted under any circumstances. Keep in mind that the format review is separate from your committee's approval of the content, which must be secured beforehand. If revisions are requested after the format check, you will have one week to make corrections and resubmit. Students who miss the April 5th deadline will need to postpone their graduation to the summer term.

questions.stem: How must students submit their thesis for format review?

options.A: As a single PDF through the online portal
options.B: By emailing a copy to the Graduate School
options.C: As a printed document delivered in person
options.D: Through their committee chair's account

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告明确说论文必须以单个PDF文件通过在线论文门户上传。B错误（reversed_intent）：公告特别强调任何情况下都不接受邮件提交，方向相反。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告没有提到纸质文件或当面递交。D错误（related_but_not_stated）：上传通过学生自己的在线门户完成，公告未提及用委员会主席的账户。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the committee's approval of the thesis content?

options.A: It is granted automatically after the format review
options.B: It must be completed before the format review
options.C: It can be obtained during the one-week revision period
options.D: It is optional for students graduating in summer

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告说格式审查与委员会对内容的批准是两回事，而内容批准必须事先取得，由此可推断它要在格式审查之前完成。A错误（over_inference）：公告说两者相互独立，内容批准不会因格式审查而自动获得。C错误（wrong_detail）：那一周是用来按格式审查意见修改重交的，不是用来获取内容批准的。D错误（unrelated_inference）：公告没有说暑期毕业生可免去内容批准，属无依据推断。
